# Native Fragments Docs

> Native Fragments is a zero-dependency, zero-build frontend framework for
> agents building AI-friendly web applications.

## Start

- [Introduction](https://docs.nativefragments.org/index.md)
- [Getting Started](https://docs.nativefragments.org/getting-started.md)
- [API Reference](https://docs.nativefragments.org/reference.md)

## Concepts

- [Routing](https://docs.nativefragments.org/routing.md)
- [Fragments](https://docs.nativefragments.org/fragments.md)
- [Components](https://docs.nativefragments.org/components.md)
- [API Routes](https://docs.nativefragments.org/api-routes.md)
- [Workers](https://docs.nativefragments.org/workers.md)
- [Signals](https://docs.nativefragments.org/signals.md)
- [Agent-Friendly Applications](https://docs.nativefragments.org/agent-friendly.md)

## Complete Context

- [llms-full.txt](https://docs.nativefragments.org/llms-full.txt)
- [Core npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nativefragments/core)
- [Signals npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nativefragments/signals)
- [Core GitHub repo](https://github.com/somedudeokay/nativefragments)
